content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.55%, Bank Nifty -0.79%, India VIX +5.79% to 18.45 — risk-off tone with breadth weak. However, IT (+0.86%) and Pharma flat-positive holding up; pockets of relative strength (BANDHANBNK, BAJAJ-AUTO, SUNPHARMA on Organon deal). Crude at $120 + USD/INR weak — favors upstream and gold. Late session (14:10), so no new MIS; CNC selectively only on high-conviction setups.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1027.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +5.7%. Current SL 1025 is essentially at S1 (1038)/breakeven+. CMP 1041.80, leaving SL at 1027 keeps a ~1.4% trail gap below CMP — disciplined. Cannot raise too tight (intraday low 1027.50) without risking noise stop-out. Q4 PAT +18%, GNPA <1%, sector momentum positive. Trail discipline applied; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive macro hedge holds with VIX +5.79%, USD/INR weak, crude $120. P&L -1.4%, SL 119 well below CMP 123.43 (~3.6% gap). No trail needed; thesis intact for geopolitical/inflation hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1780.00,
      "new_target": 1845.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +4.0%, breakout above prior swing on Organon deal momentum, near 52w high (1851). Trailing SL up from 1772 to 1780 (just under VWAP 1784.85 and ~1.5% below CMP — preserves trail-gap discipline). Target trimmed slightly to 1845 ahead of 52w high resistance. Q4 results late May is binary risk to monitor — currently >3 sessions out, so still in normal trail mode."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.50,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +2.8%, hit 52w high 491.25 intraday but faded to 481.65 — bearish reversal candle forming. SL micro-tightened from 478 to 478.50 (~0.7% below CMP). Target trimmed to 495 (just under day high resistance). FY26 production -1.7% is a watch flag; ride momentum but tighten. Note: this is a 0.5% SL move which is at the threshold but justified by today's failed-breakout pattern."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 195.00,
      "new_target": 210.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock +12.15% today on blowout Q4 PAT +68%, GNPA improvement, brokerage upgrades. Position itself at -0.8% intraday because we entered higher; SL 195 already in place. New target trimmed slightly from 215 to 210 (52w high zone resistance); no SL change requested — but technically this is a target-only modify. Thesis materially strengthened by Q4 print."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.3%. SL 296 just below CMP 297.75 — tight already. Brent at $120 supportive medium-term but APPCB stop-production order on Mori#05 + windfall-tax risk if crude sustained = real overhangs. Letting SL do its job; not loosening, not tightening (already tight). If 296 breaks, position exits cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2%. ETF tracking Pharma index +3% MoM. SL 22.85 is ~4.6% below CMP — appropriate volatility band for an ETF. Sun Pharma 23.79% weight providing tailwind. No trail needed; let it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position flat (+0.0%). Q4 PAT +22%, AUM crossed Rs 5L cr — strong print. Stock spiked to 975 then faded to 945 (sell-the-news intraday). SL 915 (~3.1% below CMP), target 985. Thesis intact, no trail justified yet (need >+2% to trail to BE). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY @ 1542 still working from earlier (508 min ago). Per ORDER HYGIENE, do NOT stack a second order. Letting it fill or expire naturally; thesis unchanged."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1027.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up modestly to 1027 to lock in ~4.4% gain while preserving room for noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive macro hedge; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1780.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up to 1780 (just under VWAP) to lock in gains on Organon momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.50,
      "reasoning": "Failed breakout from 491.25 high — micro-tighten to protect gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 print; SL 195 still appropriate cushion below VWAP 197.83."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 296 already tight at -0.6% from CMP; let stop do its job."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "ETF in modest uptrend; SL gives room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just-entered position; needs >+2% before trailing to BE."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BAJAJ-AUTO has triple catalyst May 6 (Q4 + dividend + buyback) — hold-through-binary-event risk; would only consider with ≤5% sizing. TATACHEM Q4 May 4 binary + Q3 was a loss — too risky pre-event despite volume spike. RBLBANK Emirates NBD pending SEBI approval is interesting but stock fell on results day; wait for clearer setup. SYNGENE +14.48% today not analyzed in detail — need fresh data tomorrow. TECHM IT rotation — viable if crude/INR pressure persists.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 42% with 8 CNC positions + 1 OPEN GESHIP order. Within capital discipline. Cluster check: Financial Services has PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK + BAJFINANCE — three names, ~25% of capital — at the cluster cap, so NO new financials today. Energy has ONGC + COALINDIA — well exposed. Pharma has SUNPHARMA + PHARMABEES — appropriate. Late-session (14:10), VIX +5.79% — correct posture is risk management on existing book, not new entries. Win rate 13% over 5 days is a flag — focus on letting winners run via trailing SLs (which today's actions do) rather than fresh trades that haven't been earning."
}
